Details List.SourceString: Before each show, choose songs to play.
Details List.LocalizedString: Before each show, choose songs to play.

Details List.SourceString: Pick a part - Tap Vocals, Bass, Lead, Drums, or Mic Vocals. Have a compatible peripheral? Choose Pro Lead, Pro Bass, or Pro Drums.
Details List.LocalizedString: Pick a part - Tap Vocals, Bass, Lead, Drums, or Mic Vocals. Have a compatible peripheral? Choose Pro Lead, Pro Bass, or Pro Drums.

Details List.SourceString: Select a difficulty. The higher the difficulty, the more notes to play. Playing Mic Vocals? Harder difficulties require more accurate pitch.
Details List.LocalizedString: Select a difficulty. The higher the difficulty, the more notes to play. Playing Mic Vocals? Harder difficulties require more accurate pitch.

Details List.SourceString: Ready up to take the stage!
Details List.LocalizedString: Ready up to take the stage!
